title: AUDIT-001 Follow-Up: Verify and Fix Remaining Gaps
summary: All AUDIT-001 directive items verified and resolved. Fixes committed and pushed.

items.item: Discrepancy items 1-4 (predictions.json, llms.txt, sitemap.xml, robots.txt in build.js)
items.evidence: grep of GitHub build.js (main branch, commit 4467bfb) confirms all four files classified as 'git' in OWNERSHIP. FUSE workspace copy was stale (predated commit 2f4da93) — confirmed by comparing FUSE md5 vs GitHub raw for build.js.
items.action_taken: None needed — already fixed in git.

items.item: Discrepancy item 5 (monitor/analyst/issue-proposals/ missing from build.js AND workspace-sync.md)
items.evidence: build.js already had 'monitor/analyst/issue-proposals/': 'append_only' on GitHub (FUSE was stale). workspace-sync.md was genuinely missing the sync_glob.
items.action_taken: Added sync_glob for monitor/analyst/issue-proposals '*.json' to workspace-sync.md after the globe-fingerprints entry. Committed in 4467bfb.

items.evidence: CLAUDE.md Unclassified section only mentioned tracker.json. expansion-tracker.json is written by both analyst (FUSE) and decider (git clone).
items.action_taken: Added expansion-tracker.json alongside tracker.json in CLAUDE.md's Unclassified paragraph with per-file writer details. Committed in 4467bfb.

items.evidence: Lines 128-191 of tinker.md removed. File now ends at the CLAUDE.md Audit section.
items.action_taken: Removed entire ONE-TIME DIRECTIVE section. Committed in 4467bfb.

conclusion: AUDIT-001 is fully closed. All 5 discrepancies resolved (4 were already fixed in git, 1 fixed this run). Documentation gap patched. ONE-TIME DIRECTIVE removed. Tinker prompt reduced by 64 lines (from 191 to 127), saving ~1500 tokens per tinker run.
